title: PhaseWrap-RoPE: Bounded Phase-Wrap Positional Scoring Evidence and Hardware-Validation Tooling
description: Open-source bounded evidence repository for PhaseWrap-RoPE, including a phase-wrap positional scoring rule, deterministic validation packets, a machine-verifiable Stage 4 hardware sweep, provider-aware IBM Runtime and Amazon Braket artifacts, Stage 5 classical attention baselines, Stage 6 downstream attention benchmark, Stage 7 toy transformer ablation, and Stage 8 local phase-cued Needle-style retrieval benchmark. The release does not claim broad quantum advantage, production transformer superiority, full transformer-scale validation, or general cross-backend robustness.
